name: Badge
description: Displays a compact numeric, string, or dot annotation for related content.

value.description: Displayed badge value; omit to render a dot badge

max.description: Maximum numeric value before appending a plus suffix

children.description: Anchor content; when provided, badge renders top-right

slots.children: Anchor element or inline content the badge annotates.

aria: aria-label — use on the focusable anchored element to describe badge meaning
When badge is inline, use aria-label when extra context is needed
